events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Chinese Hospital for client 1096. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 700 mg/meal, carbs 35–70 g/meal. Prefers Vietnamese; dislikes beef. Cooking ability: none. 10 meals/week, zone Bayview-Hunters Point.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.
